---
title: ""
toc: false
description: "PhD positions in AI for sustainability at IIT Gandhinagar. Research areas: environmental monitoring, health sensing, energy analytics, computer vision, LLMs. Advisor: Prof. Nipun Batra."
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "PhD Student - AI for Sustainability",
  "description": "PhD positions in Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Gandhinagar, working on AI for sustainability including environmental monitoring, health sensing, energy analytics, and machine learning for social good.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-09",
  "employmentType": "FULL_TIME",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
    "name": "Sustainability Lab, IIT Gandhinagar",
    "sameAs": "https://sustainability-lab.github.io"
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
      "addressLocality": "Gandhinagar",
      "addressRegion": "Gujarat",
      "addressCountry": "IN"
    }
  },
  "qualifications": "BTech/BE/MSc/MTech in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related fields. Strong programming skills and interest in machine learning research.",
  "educationRequirements": "Master's or Bachelor's degree in a relevant field"
}
</script>

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=openings.html#phd-positions">
